title: Tetradoxa omeiensis
intro: Tetradoxa omeiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as a type of citrus fruit tree. The health benefits of Tetradoxa omeiensis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Tetradoxa omeiensis include limonoids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Tetradoxa omeiensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
